mapper.select: SELECT * FROM system_notice ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT n.* FROM system_notice n LEFT JOIN user_notice_read r ON n.id = r.notice_id AND r.user_id = #{userId} WHERE n.status = 1 AND n.popup_start_time <= NOW() AND n.popup_end_time >= NOW() AND r.id IS NULL ORDER BY n.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO system_notice (title, content, activity_id, popup_start_time, popup_end_time, status, create_admin_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{activityId}, #{popupStartTime}, #{popupEndTime}, #{status}, #{createAdminId})
